revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23986660476|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Ichihara History Museum]][[ja:市原歴史博物館]] {{Orphan|date=November 2023}}
{{Infobox museum | name = Ichihara History Museum | native_name = 市原歴史博物館 | native_name_lang = ja | logo = | logo_upright = | logo_alt = | logo_caption = | image = Ichihara Rekishi Hakubutsukan.jpg | image_upright = | alt = | caption = | map_type = | map_relief = | map_size = | map_caption = | map_dot_label = | coordinates = {{coord|35.504811|N|140.129304|E|format=dms|display=inline,title}} | former_name = <!-- or |former_names= --> | established = 20 November 2022<ref name="open">{{cite web |url=https://www.imuseum.jp/material/files/group/1/kaikan_chirashi.pdf |title=2022.11.20 OPEN |publisher=Ichihara History Museum |access-date=11 November 2023}}</ref> | location = 1489 Nōman, {{ill|Ichihara, Chiba|en|Ichihara, Chiba|qid=Q207881|lt=Ichihara|1=Ichihara, Chiba}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|qid=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}}, Japan | type = | accreditation = | key_holdings = | collections = | collection_size = | visitors = | founder = | executive_director = | deputy_director = | leader_type = | leader = | director = | president = | chairperson = | curator = | architect = | historian = | owner = | employees = | publictransit = | website = {{Official website|https://www.imuseum.jp/index.html}} ({{ill|Japanese language|en|Japanese language|qid=Q5287|lt=ja|1=Japanese language}}) }} The {{nihongo|'''Ichihara History Museum'''|市原歴史博物館|Ichihara Rekishi Hakubutsukan}}, styled the '''I'Museum Center''', opened in {{ill|Ichihara, Chiba|en|Ichihara, Chiba|qid=Q207881|lt=Ichihara|1=Ichihara, Chiba}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|qid=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}}, Japan, in 2022.<ref name="open"/> The collection and displays document thirty thousand years of local history.<ref name="open"/><ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.city.ichihara.chiba.jp/article?articleId=60ecf5209da37347338e16e6 |script-title=ja:いちはらの歴史をつなぐ拠点施設へ 「I'Museum Center（市原歴史博物館）」が令和4年秋開館予定 |trans-title="I'Museum Center (Ichihara History Museum)", a facility that connects the history of Ichihara, scheduled to open in the autumn of 2022 |language=ja |publisher={{ill|Ichihara, Chiba|en|Ichihara, Chiba|qid=Q207881|lt=Ichihara City|1=Ichihara, Chiba}} |access-date=11 November 2023}}</ref>
==See also== * {{ill|National Museum of Japanese History|en|National Museum of Japanese History|qid=Q3330690|lt=National Museum of Japanese History|1=National Museum of Japanese History}}
==References== {{Reflist}}
==External links== * {{in lang|ja}} [https://www.imuseum.jp/index.html Ichihara History Museum]
